title: Sivankoil (Raja Raja Choleshwar Mahadevar Temple)

overview.short: Rajarajeswaramudaiya Mahadevar Temple (Tamil: இராஜராஜேஸ்வரமுடைய மகாதேவர் கோவில், Sivapuram Sivan Temple is a Shiva temple located in Sivapuram in Kanchipuram District of Tamil Nadu
overview.description: Rajarajeswaramudaiya Mahadevar Temple (Tamil: இராஜராஜேஸ்வரமுடைய மகாதேவர் கோவில், Sivapuram Sivan Temple is a Shiva temple located in Sivapuram in Kanchipuram District of Tamil Nadu, India.

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Narasingapuram, Thiruvallur
topPlaces.description: Narasingapuram (Tamil: [naɾasoŋɡabɯɾam]) is a village that belongs to the Kadambathur block of Tiruvallur district, located about 55 km from Chennai and 21 km from Arakkonam.

topPlaces.name: Lakshmi Narasimhar Temple, Narasinghapuram
topPlaces.description: Sri Lakshmi Narasimhar Temple (Tamil: ஸ்ரீ லக்ஷ்மி நரசிம்ஹர் பெருமாள்) is located about 55 km from Chennai and 21 km from Arakkonam, in Narasingapuram, Thiruvallur. The temple is dedicated to Hindu deity Narasimha, who is avatar of Vishnu and his consort Lakshmi.

topPlaces.name: Deivanayaka Easwarar Temple
topPlaces.description: Deivanayaka Easwarar Temple (தெய்வநாயக ஈஸ்வரர் கோயில்) or Arambeshwarar Temple is a Hindu temple located at Elumiyankottur near Perambakkam village in the Tiruvallur district of Tamil Nadu, India. The presiding deity is Shiva.

topPlaces.name: Tiruvirkolam
topPlaces.description: Tiruvirkolam (also Thiruvirkolam or Koovam or Coovum or Cooum) is an ancient temple town on the banks of the Koovam River in Tamil Nadu, India. It is located about 70 km from Chennai.

topPlaces.name: Tripuranthaka Swamy Temple
topPlaces.description: Tripuranthaka Swamy Temple is a Hindu temple located in the Tiruvallur district of Tamil Nadu, India. The presiding deity is Shiva.

topPlaces.name: Perambakkam
topPlaces.description: Perambakkam is a suburb of Chennai in Tiruvallur district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. It is a census town in Tiruvallur taluk.

topPlaces.name: Jalantheeswarar Temple
topPlaces.description: Jalanatheeswarar Temple (also called Thiruvooral) is a Hindu temple dedicated to the deity Shiva and located in Thakkolam, a village in Vellore district in the South Indian state of Tamil Nadu. Shiva is worshipped as Jalanatheeswarar and is represented by the lingam.

topPlaces.name: Senji, Chennai
topPlaces.description: Senji is a village in western outskirts of Chennai, located in Tiruvallur district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu.

items.note: Narasingapuram (Tamil: [naɾasoŋɡabɯɾam]) is a village that belongs to the Kadambathur block of Tiruvallur district, located about 55 km from Chennai and 21 km from Arakkonam.

Sri Lakshmi Narasimhar Temple (Tamil: ஸ்ரீ லக்ஷ்மி நரசிம்ஹர் பெருமாள்) is located about 55 km from Chennai and 21 km from Arakkonam, in Narasingapuram, Thiruvallur. The temple is dedicated to Hindu deity Narasimha, who is avatar of Vishnu and his consort Lakshmi.

Deivanayaka Easwarar Temple (தெய்வநாயக ஈஸ்வரர் கோயில்) or Arambeshwarar Temple is a Hindu temple located at Elumiyankottur near Perambakkam village in the Tiruvallur district of Tamil Nadu, India. The presiding deity is Shiva.
Tiruvirkolam (also Thiruvirkolam or Koovam or Coovum or Cooum) is an ancient temple town on the banks of the Koovam River in Tamil Nadu, India. It is located about 70 km from Chennai.
Tripuranthaka Swamy Temple is a Hindu temple located in the Tiruvallur district of Tamil Nadu, India. The presiding deity is Shiva.
Perambakkam is a suburb of Chennai in Tiruvallur district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. It is a census town in Tiruvallur taluk.

Jalanatheeswarar Temple (also called Thiruvooral) is a Hindu temple dedicated to the deity Shiva and located in Thakkolam, a village in Vellore district in the South Indian state of Tamil Nadu. Shiva is worshipped as Jalanatheeswarar and is represented by the lingam.
Senji is a village in western outskirts of Chennai, located in Tiruvallur district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Sivankoil (Raja Raja Choleshwar Mahadevar Temple)?
faq.a: The best time to visit Sivankoil (Raja Raja Choleshwar Mahadevar Temple) is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Sivankoil (Raja Raja Choleshwar Mahadevar Temple)?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Chennai International Airport (41 km) and the nearest railway station is Chennai Central (53 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Sivankoil (Raja Raja Choleshwar Mahadevar Temple)?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Sivankoil (Raja Raja Choleshwar Mahadevar Temple) at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Sivankoil (Raja Raja Choleshwar Mahadevar Temple)?
faq.a: Stays in Sivankoil (Raja Raja Choleshwar Mahadevar Temple) start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Sivankoil (Raja Raja Choleshwar Mahadevar Temple)?
faq.a: The top attractions are Narasingapuram, Thiruvallur, Lakshmi Narasimhar Temple, Narasinghapuram, Deivanayaka Easwarar Temple, Tiruvirkolam, Tripuranthaka Swamy Temple.
